examples.title: Diffusion Training Loop
examples.description: Simplified training process for noise prediction
examples.code:
FOR EACH training step:
  1. Sample x0 from data
  2. Choose random timestep t
  3. Add noise: xt = sqrt(α_t)x0 + sqrt(1-α_t)ε
  4. Predict ε_θ(xt, t)
  5. Compute L2 loss ||ε - ε_θ||^2
  6. Update model parameters
examples.explanation: Core training loop where model learns to predict noise at different corruption levels
